channel.title: Network Security & Infrastructure on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Network Security & Infrastructure on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Network Traffic Analysis & Incident Response (Wazuh & PCAP)
item.description: Objective: To perform a technical post-mortem analysis of a network intrusion attempt using centralized log management and deep packet inspection.

item.title: Hybrid SIEM Architecture for SEO & Security Intelligence
item.description: Objective: To design and implement a unified SIEM workflow that integrates Splunk and Microsoft Sentinel to detect SEO-specific threats and automated bot attacks.

item.title: Network Traffic Baselining and Anomaly Detection
item.description: Objective: To establish a behavioral baseline for legitimate network traffic and use protocol analysis to isolate potential security threats.

item.title: Centralized Network Security via Router-Level Filtering
item.description: Objective: To implement non-device-specific security controls by enforcing domain blocking at the network gateway.

item.title: Automated Domain Blocking via Batch Scripting
item.description: Objective: To develop a reusable and scalable automation tool for neutralizing network threats at the system level.

item.title: Network Traffic Analysis & Automated Threat Mitigation
item.description: Objective: To identify suspicious network traffic using protocol analysis and implement multi-layered blocking mechanisms to secure a local environment.

item.title: Network Security Fundamentals and Threat Assessment
item.description: Objective: To conduct a comprehensive study of network threat vectors and security controls to establish a foundational defense strategy for organizational environments.
